back_translation: And the angel showed me a river of the water that gives life, clear as crystal, which flowed out from the throne of God and of the Lamb

In the middle of the streets of the city, and on both sides of the river, there was the tree of life, bearing twelve kinds of fruit, each month yielding fruit. And the leaves of that tree are for the healing of the nations
And there will be no curse anymore, and the throne of God and of the Lamb will be in that city, and the servants of His will serve Him
And they will see the face of Him, and the name of Him will be on their foreheads
And there will be no nighttime anymore, and they have no need of the light of a lamp or the light of the sun, because the Lord God will give them light. And they will reign as kings forever and ever
And the angel said to me, ‘These words are faithful and true, and the Lord God of the spirits of the prophets has sent the angel of His to show to His servants the things that must occur soon
And behold, I will come soon. The one who keeps the words of the prophecy of this book is blessed’
And I, John, am the one who heard and saw these things. And when I had heard and seen, I fell down to worship at the feet of the angel who showed these things to me

And the angel said to me, ‘Do not do that. I am a fellow-servant with you, and a fellow-servant with your prophet brothers, and a fellow-servant with those who keep the words of this book. Worship God’
And the angel said to me, ‘Do not seal up the words of the prophecy of this book, because the time has drawn near

Let the one who acts unjustly continue to act unjustly, let the one who is filthy continue to be filthy, let the one who is righteous continue to do righteousness, and let the one who is holy continue to maintain holiness
Behold, I will come soon, and my reward is with me, in order to repay each one according to his deeds
I am the Alpha and the Omega, the Beginning and the End, the First and the Last
Those who wash their robes are blessed, so that they may have the right to access the tree of life, and so that they may enter the city through the gates of the city
Outside are the dogs, the sorcerers, the sexually-immoral, the murderers, the idolaters, and everyone who loves and practices falsehood
‘I, Jesus, have sent the angel of mine to testify about these things to you for the churches. I am the Root and the Descendant of David, the bright Morning-Star’
And the Spirit and the Bride say, ‘Come.’ And the one who hears, let him also say, ‘Come.’ And let the one who is thirsty come, and the one who desires receive the water that gives life without cost
I testify to everyone who hears the words of the prophecy of this book: If anyone adds anything to these words, God will add the plagues that are written in this book to that person
And if anyone takes away the words of this prophecy book, God will take away that person's portion from the tree of life and from the holy city, which are written in this book
The One who testifies about these things says, ‘Yes, I am coming soon.’ Amen. O Lord Jesus, please come
May the grace of the Lord Jesus Christ dwell with everyone
